featureName: BUG-029-005: Decouple connector enable-signal from volume-mount-path emptiness; convert the 4 remaining dev-compose `${VAR:-default}` volume-mount substitutions to fail-loud SST
status_reason: All 29 DoD items satisfied with inline raw evidence; RED→GREEN proof captured; full Go unit suite GREEN; static checks clean; SST emission verified for dev + test envs; Compose substitution GREEN dev + test; Compose substitution RED proof verbatim with Gate G028 / HL-RESCAN-012 attribution; .gitkeep fixtures committed past data/ ignore via .gitignore exception lines.

executionHistory.evidence: Packet artifacts authored at specs/029-devops-pipeline/bugs/BUG-029-005-connector-volume-mount-fail-loud-sweep/: spec.md (11 ACs), design.md (6 coordinated changes DD-1..DD-6), scopes.md (1 scope + 12 Gherkin scenarios SCN-029-005-A..L), scenario-manifest.json (12 scenarios), state.json.

5 source files modified (scripts/commands/config.sh 4-block SST fallback, docker-compose.yml 4 fail-loud volume-mounts + 4 bare-literal env overrides + 6-line BUG-029-005 contract comment, cmd/core/connectors.go 3 redundant guards dropped, internal/deploy/dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go empty allowlist + 2 new test functions + adversarial fixture update, .gitignore 4 exception lines), 1 new test file (cmd/core/connectors_startup_gate_test.go 150 lines), 4 .gitkeep anchor files (sha e69de29bb2d1d6434b8b29ae775ad8c2e48c5391). See report.md > Implementation Code Diff for all 9 sub-section diffs.

Targeted dev-compose contract suite (TestDevComposeContract_* PASS internal/deploy 0.110s), targeted connectors startup-gate suite (TestConnectorStartupGate_* PASS cmd/core 0.070s), targeted prod-compose canary suite (TestComposeContract_* 9 tests PASS unchanged), cross-package smoke (./smackerel.sh test unit --go finished OK). RED→GREEN proof: regression of line 127 to ${BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR:-./data/bookmarks-import} triggered both dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go:139 FAIL and dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go:381 FAIL with named-var Gate G028 / HL-RESCAN-012 messages; restoration returned both to PASS. See report.md > Test Evidence > Red→Green proof for verbatim trace.

3 persistent in-tree adversarial Go tests now guard the new contract on every ./smackerel.sh test unit --go invocation: TestDevComposeContract_FailLoudVolumeMounts + 3 adversarial sub-cases (${X:-default}, ${X?msg}, bare ${X}); TestComposeEnvOverrides_ContainerInternalConstants + 1 adversarial (${X:+/data/...} re-introduction); TestConnectorStartupGate_BooleanIsSoleLoadBearingSignal + 1 adversarial (synthetic guard re-introduction). Pre-existing BUG-029-003 canary TestDevComposeContract_NoUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks now runs against empty allowlist. Pre-existing spec 042 + BUG-042-001..005 prod-compose canaries unaffected and PASS unchanged. See report.md > Audit Evidence > Regression Evidence.

Minimum-viable-change verified: 5 source files + 1 new test file + 4 .gitkeep + 7 packet artifacts; zero foreign-spec content touched; zero CI workflow changes; zero ML sidecar changes; zero production runtime Go code changes outside the 3 connector guard simplifications; zero config/smackerel.yaml schema changes. See report.md > Audit Evidence > OWASP A05 / Privacy / Minimum-viable-change.

Static checks clean: ./smackerel.sh check exit=0 (Config is in sync with SST, env_file drift guard OK, scenarios registered 5 rejected 0), ./smackerel.sh lint exit=0 (Web validation passed), go vet ./internal/deploy/... ./cmd/core/... exit=0, gofmt -l internal/deploy/ cmd/core/ empty. SST emission stable across dev + test envs (lines 178/186/202/229 identical). Compose substitution GREEN both envs exit=0. See report.md > Validation Evidence > Static checks + SST emission + Compose substitution GREEN.

OWASP A05 (Security Misconfiguration): fix strengthens security posture by converting 4 silent-default-fallback substitutions into fail-loud ones — operators attempting to bring up dev stack without SST-generated env file now see clear named-var error pointing at operator fix path instead of silent wrong-path connectors. Privacy: zero PII / connector-content / user-data exposure changes; 4 .gitkeep anchors empty; data/<connector>/ remain gitignored. See report.md > Audit Evidence > OWASP A05 / Privacy / Minimum-viable-change.

Compose substitution RED proof captured verbatim: SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE=config/generated/dev.env docker compose --env-file <(grep -vE '^(BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR|MAPS_IMPORT_DIR|BROWSER_HISTORY_PATH|TWITTER_ARCHIVE_DIR)=' config/generated/dev.env) -f docker-compose.yml config -q → 'error while interpolating services.smackerel-core.volumes.[]: required variable BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR is missing a value: Gate G028 / HL-RESCAN-012 — must be SST-emitted; run ./smackerel.sh config generate or ./smackerel.sh up'. Error message names regressed var, contains explicit Gate G028 / HL-RESCAN-012 attribution, and names operator fix path. Compose GREEN dev + test envs exit 0. Targeted suites all PASS. Gitkeep bootstrap: git check-ignore -v confirms 4 exception lines (.gitignore:34..37). See report.md > Validation Evidence.

All 29 DoD items satisfied with inline raw evidence (≥10 lines per item where applicable). Scope 1 status flipped Not Started → Done. State transition guard expected EXIT=0 (mechanical Gate G023 enforcement before status flip to done). No knownDrift, no G040 skip markers, no done_with_concerns shortcut. SHIP_IT.
